sourceFacts.typography: Source CSS records Public Sans body, Libre Franklin heading/button/nav/accordion modules, desktop h1 72px, h2 48px, h3 36px, h4 25px, h5 22px, h6 20px, p/a 18px, and responsive reductions.
sourceFacts.visualLanguage: Black automotive canvas, acid-yellow accents, dark rounded cards, yellow vehicle imagery, pill CTAs, hover card movement.

sourceChecks.contains: Source: AxeMobile by Widagdos via Envato Elements.
Bring Back the New Car Feel with Our Professional Detailing
Header structure: source header is a 106px dark band
Choose the Perfect Detailing Package for Your Car

backgroundImageChecks.label: Transparent service car foreground
backgroundImageChecks.requirement: transparent floating car cutout (not a rectangular photo in a box)

videoBackgroundChecks.requirement: full-cover autoplay muted loop playsinline <video> background
videoBackgroundChecks.forbidden: flattening the video slot to a static background image

typographyDesignChecks.label: Full-page source typography scale

fontFamilies.headingModules: Libre Franklin for .heading-equivalent h2/h3/h4, feature titles, service/pricing/blog titles, buttons, nav/dropdowns, and accordion triggers

responsiveScale.max768: h1 48px, h2 32px, h3 24px, h4 20px, h5 18px, h6 16px, p/a 14px

requiredTextStructure: Comprehensive Car Detailing Services For A Flawless Finish
Unmatched Quality, Precision, And Care for Your Car
Customer Experiences That Speak For Themselves
Choose the Perfect Detailing Package for Your Car
Your Car's Best Look Is Just One Detail Away
Everything You Need to Know About Our Detailing Services
Expert Tips & Insights For Car Enthusiasts
typographyDesignChecks.forbidden: desktop section headings at 43.2px Public Sans, section labels at 12.48px, body/card/blog/pricing text at 14.4px on desktop, CTAs at 14.4px/44px, accordion triggers at 16px Public Sans, or source titles rewritten to casual sentence-case

heroSpacingDesignChecks.label: Hero CTA to feature-card breathing room
sourceRefs: responsive source rule resets .feature margin-top to 0 on mobile
heroSpacingDesignChecks.requiredBehavior: Preserve the source-like upward overlap of the feature card band while keeping a visible desktop gap between the hero CTA bottom edge and the first feature-card top edge.
heroSpacingDesignChecks.desktopAcceptance: CTA-to-feature-card gap must read as intentional breathing room, not a near-touching or flush edge.
heroSpacingDesignChecks.responsiveAcceptance: Tablet and mobile must keep readable separation and must not collapse the CTA into the first feature card.
heroSpacingDesignChecks.forbidden: desktop .hero .pill-button bottom within a few pixels of .feature-band top, feature cards touching/appearing flush with the CTA, or removing the source-like feature-card overlap entirely

headerDesignChecks.label: Source header topology and typography
headerDesignChecks.fontFamily: Libre Franklin for nav and appointment button
headerDesignChecks.activeLink: Homepage active state is acid yellow text with no decorative underline
headerDesignChecks.dropdown: 220px dark rounded menu with 18px Libre Franklin items
headerDesignChecks.logoFootprint: compact WLFS logo footprint; do not let the logo crowd or push the centered nav
headerDesignChecks.forbidden: 14px desktop nav text, invented active underline rules, oversized WLFS logo crowding nav, small 46px appointment pill, transparent/glass header treatment, or missing source dropdown proportions

footerDesignChecks.label: Source footer heading hierarchy
footerDesignChecks.layout: three desktop columns; tablet brand spans full width while navigation and contact sit in two columns; mobile stacks
footerDesignChecks.alignment: footer Navigation heading, underline, list, and active Homepage link must share the same left edge
footerDesignChecks.brandColumn: logo box above white/bold source copy, followed by full-width 342px outline pill CTA
footerDesignChecks.webdevfulAttribution: footer copyright/credit row must visibly include Webdevful company branding as a linked provider attribution
footerDesignChecks.activeLink: Homepage active state remains acid yellow
footerDesignChecks.forbidden: centered footer navigation headings/lists, button-sized footer CTA, tablet single-column collapse, plain footer headings without underline rules, missing Visit/Contact title separation, active Homepage link rendered gray, or footer copyright/credit row missing visible Webdevful attribution
